feedback_files.tests/test_repair_feedback.py:
from decimal import Decimal

from billing.ledger import decode_charge
from billing.wire import encode_charge


def test_partner_amount_keeps_all_significant_digits():
    amount = Decimal("9007199254740993.125000000000000001")
    restored = decode_charge(encode_charge("ch_precise", amount))
    assert restored["amount"] == amount
